entity: U.S. Army Combat Capabilities Development Command's Army Research Laboratory
occurrence_sentence: Now, Army scientists have validated this approach by demonstrating the feasibility of a quantum logic gate comprised of photonic circuits and optical crystals. The team, which included Kurt Jacobs, of the U.S. Army Combat Capabilities Development Command's Army Research Laboratory and Mikkel Heuck and Dirk Englund, both of the Massachusetts Institute of Technology, published their findings in the Physical Review Letters.
